title: Season Fields
description: A modpack focus on seasons and farming.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/b6e9ftF3-uI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

這個模組包用於[yoyolee](https://youtu.be/b6e9ftF3-uI)的四季夢田生存。

- 投入《四季夢田》的鄉村冒險！
- 體驗種田的魅力與四季變化的美感。
- 探索為你的 Minecraft 世界帶來的新方塊與家具。
- 使用《農夫樂事》種植農作物並烹飪豐盛的餐點。
- 用鄉村風格的桌子、椅子和裝飾方塊裝飾你的溫馨小屋。
- 透過《Serene Seasons》觀賞田野在春、夏、秋、冬中的轉變。
- 照料你的農場、打造獨特的建築，或是享受自然的循環。
- 在生存之旅中享受溫馨的季節風情。

This modpack is used in [yoyolee](https://youtu.be/b6e9ftF3-uI)'s Season Fields youtube video.

- Dive into a rustic adventure with Season Fields!
- Experience the charm of farming and the beauty of changing seasons.
- Discover a wealth of new blocks and furniture for your Minecraft world.
- Cultivate crops and cook hearty meals with Farmer’s Delight.
- Furnish your cozy home with rustic tables, chairs, and decorative blocks.
- Watch your fields transform through spring, summer, autumn, and winter with Serene Seasons.
- Tend to your farm, craft unique building pieces, or embrace the cycle of nature.
- Enjoy a cozy, seasonal twist to your survival journey.
